prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国地质大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大 学排名2026年第75名，近年排名稳定在63–75区间，属中上水平理工类院校；该校在2021–2026年声誉文件中未出现明显负面或正面舆情事件，抖音热度未进入全 国前100名，整体关注度一般，报考心理无明显异常信号；地质学、地质资源与地质工程为该校传统优势学科（第四轮评估均为A+），计算机类、电子信息、电 气工程等热门工科专业均有开设，学科结构均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业近年持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；吉林省2 026年高考总人数110868人，按近年比例估算物理类约79825人，较2025年物理类80421人略有减少，竞争压力微降；学校 位于北京市，对吉林省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在吉林省招生计划占比较小（约79人），属跨省招生，地域偏好对位次影响有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 11322 → 14136 → 15277 → 12955 → 13097, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking rebounded to 12955, and in 2025 it remained basically flat at 13097; the fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 2000 places, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 13097. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province's Physics Category was 70 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 78 in 2024, and slightly adjusted to 77 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 79 students, a small expansion of about 2.6% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Geosciences (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 75th, with a stable ranking in the 63–75 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. In the reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, there were no obvious negative or positive public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the national top 100, indicating generally low attention and no abnormal signals in application psychology. Geology, and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are its traditional advantageous disciplines (both rated A+ in the fourth round of evaluation). Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering are also offered, with a balanced disciplinary structure.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended in recent years, with high social application popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Jilin Province is 110,868, with an estimated Physics Category of about 79,825 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease from 80,421 in 2025, leading to a slight reduction in competition pressure. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Jilin Province candidates. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province is relatively small (about 79 students), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13,097, the small expansion of 2.6% in the 2026 plan, a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in the province, stable university reputation, and continued high popularity of popular engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13,331, with a range of 12,831–13,831.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12,831–13,831, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Geology Base Class, Data Science, Mechanical, Law, etc.) as the main choices. Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Software, Electrical, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information) can be used as reach targets, while Tier 3 majors (Geological Energy, Materials, Civil Engineering, etc.) serve as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<12,831), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>13,831), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.
